goal: Develop personal teachers without breaking a shared runtime or current supervision plane

phases.goal: Stabilize common knowledge and shared runtime evidence
entry_rules: teacher_mode is GLOBAL at cohort level

phases.goal: Run personal curriculum as a shadow package without replacing the global teacher
entry_rules: local model or candidate package exists
promotion verdict is not yet final
exit_rules: quality relative to global is positive

phases.goal: Promote personal package to primary while keeping rollback path explicit

guardrails: Do not overload paper_live_bucket with teacher package modes
Do not replace learning_supervisor_snapshot or supervisor_snapshot
Do not assume ONNX routing is dynamic in phase 1
Use promotion snapshots and history instead of direct raw runtime snapshots
codex_expectations: Add adapters before changing runtime semantics
Treat cohort-level teacher_mode and runtime teacher_package_mode as separate concepts
